title: Figma Comment Digest — Designer Revision Brief
description: The single data contract the engine emits and the dashboard + n8n consume. One brief per Figma file (per batch). All prose fields (summary/action) are LLM-generated; all counts/ids/pins are deterministic from the Figma REST API.

key.description: Figma file key parsed from the /design/<key>/ URL

batchLabel.description: e.g. 'Batch 2' — derived from the page name the comments cluster on, or null

cursor.description: Change-detection watermark. n8n stores this per file and only re-summarizes when it moves.

latestActivityAt.description: max(created_at) across all comments incl. replies

commentCount.description: total comments incl. replies; a change here or in latestActivityAt triggers regeneration

isClient.description: true = external client stakeholder; false = internal team. Heuristic set by engine, editable.

byRoute.description: thread counts per owner the item is routed to

themes.description: Cross-ad clusters (the LLM groups repeated/duplicate feedback). This is the 'don't make the designer read 4 copies of the same note' layer.

label.description: short human title, e.g. 'Value proposition unclear'

summary.description: 1-2 sentence synthesis of what the client wants across the grouped threads

threadIds.description: commentIds of the top-level threads in this cluster

ads.description: One entry per commented frame/ad, in canvas reading order.

nodeId.description: the enclosing frame node id the comment pins resolved to

page.description: canvas/page name the frame lives on

sectionLabel.description: nearest heading/section text above the frame, e.g. 'Colostrum Soda', if detectable

thumbnailUrl.description: PNG render URL from GET /v1/images (24h TTL) — dashboard should cache/persist

unplaced.description: Threads whose pin could not be resolved to a frame (canvas-level pins, deleted nodes). Shown in a catch-all lane so nothing is silently dropped.

commentType.description: copy=wording/language edit; value-prop=messaging/angle/pain-point; design=layout/visual/color/hierarchy; compliance=claim/legal/brand-rule; question=needs an answer before work; approval=sign-off/positive; other=uncategorized

route.description: who should action this. 'strategist' = a messaging/value-prop decision the designer can't make; 'none' = approval/no-op

verbatim.description: the client's exact words (never paraphrased) — the designer must see what was literally said

action.description: LLM's concrete, imperative restatement of what to do; empty string if route!=designer or it's a pure question/approval

themeId.description: the cluster this thread belongs to, or null
